twitchAuth.title: Twitch Authorization
twitchAuth.subtitle: Manage Twitch connection and OAuth refresh token.
twitchAuth.noTwitchMode: No-Twitch mode: Twitch:ClientId is not configured. Add it to appsettings.Development.json to enable.
twitchAuth.startHint: Authorize page opened in a new tab. After authorizing, Twitch will redirect to the callback. If the tab failed to open, copy this URL manually:
twitchAuth.resetConfirmMessage: This clears the stored refresh token. The next session will need to walk the full OAuth flow.
rules.title: Workflow Rules
rules.subtitle: Read-only list/show. Create and JSON editing arrive in Task 20f.
ruleEditor.subtitle: Edit conditions and actions JSON directly. Validate via CLI dry-run first when possible.

ruleEditor.trigger.noTypedFields: No typed filters for this event type.
ruleEditor.throttle.title: Throttle
ruleEditor.onFailure.title: On failure steps
ruleEditor.steps.title: Step metadata
ruleEditor.steps.empty: Add actions JSON to edit step metadata.
ruleEditor.unsupportedFields: Imported rule contains fields not editable in the form. Use Advanced JSON in the relevant section to inspect them: {fields}
ruleEditor.hint: Supports file upload, paste, and direct edit. Pasting > 1 MB is rejected.
ruleEditor.tooLarge: Content exceeds the 1 MB cap and was rejected.
ruleEditor.drawer.title: Edit workflow rule
ruleEditor.drawer.subtitle: Use tabs for common edits; Advanced JSON remains available from the table.
rules.conflictMessage: Rule version was updated elsewhere. The list has been refreshed; reapply your change against the latest state.
rules.col.name: name
rules.detail.empty: Select a rule from the list to inspect details.
rules.deleteConfirmMessage: This permanently deletes rule {id}. This cannot be undone.
timers.title: Workflow Timers
timers.subtitle: Schedule workflow rules to run on local intervals.

chatOutbox.subtitle: Inspect rendered chat messages produced by workflow SendChatMessage actions.
chatOutbox.empty: No chat outbox items match the current filters.
timers.detail.title: Timer detail
timers.detail.empty: Select a timer from the list to inspect or edit it.
members.title: Members (read-only)
members.subtitle: Read-only view. Seed and delete are handled by the CLI / manual test surface.
members.detail.empty: Select a member from the list to inspect details.
members.dialog.reasonPlaceholder: Describe why this change is needed.
members.adjust.title: Adjust member loyalty
members.reset.title: Reset member values
members.delete.title: Delete member
members.delete.warning: This permanently deletes the member. Audit entries are removed too. Provide a reason and a valid token within 30 seconds.
members.delete.expired: Delete token expired. Request a new token before deleting again.
members.audit.title: Member audit log
members.audit.empty: No audit entries for this member yet.
members.cardSettings.title: Loyalty card visual config (default: rotan-checkin)
members.cardSettings.background.label: Custom card background URL
members.cardSettings.stamp.label: Custom stamp image URL
members.cardSettings.loadFailed: Failed to load loyalty card settings
twitchAuth.clientIdEdit.title: Twitch Client ID configuration
twitchAuth.clientIdEdit.description: Enter and save your Twitch Client ID. Required before starting OAuth.
monitor.title: Event Monitor
monitor.subtitle: Live SignalR envelope feed from `/hubs/events`.
monitor.empty: No events yet. Trigger a simulate or wait for a platform event.
errorCode.WORKFLOW_RULE_ID_NOT_ALLOWED: Workflow rule ids are generated by the backend; do not pass one in the request.
errorCode.WORKFLOW_RULE_CONFLICT: Rule version was updated elsewhere. Reload and retry.
errorCode.CIRCULAR_WORKFLOW_REFERENCE: Workflow configuration produces a circular reference.
errorCode.ACTION_MISSING_REQUIRED_PARAM: Action is missing a required parameter.
errorCode.INVALID_RULE_ID_MISMATCH: Rule id in URL does not match the body.
errorCode.CONFIG_KEY_SECURITY_NAMESPACE: security.* settings can only be modified by system tooling.
errorCode.OAUTH_CREDENTIAL_NAMESPACE: oauth.* settings can only be modified by the OAuth flow.
errorCode.MEMBER_CONCURRENCY_CONFLICT: Member changed elsewhere. Reload the latest version and try again.
errorCode.TWITCH_OAUTH_STATE_INVALID: OAuth state failed validation or expired. Restart the authorization flow.
errorCode.TWITCH_OAUTH_EXCHANGE_FAILED: Twitch token exchange failed. Verify configuration and network and retry.
errorCode.INTERNAL_ERROR: Unexpected backend error; check the logs.
errorCode.NETWORK_ERROR: Network request failed; verify the Web host is running.
status.title: System Status
status.subtitle: Local API, Twitch authorization, and stream event state.
